segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Happy lisa, have you managed to set up the new software on your computer? Not yet. I tried installing IT, but I kick error message. Did you be check if your system meets the software requirements? Yes, my computer is definitely compatible, so I think that might be a network issue. You should contact IT support. They can help you sort IT out. Good idea. I'll give them a cool this afternoon. Let me know how IT goes.
